div.div:
> Elahna (specifically lib/elahna_web/controllers/file_content_controller.ex) is serving priv/static/index.html
> The button you clicked was enhanced with HTMX tags. A GET request was sent to the back-end (endpoint /xml/demo)
> Function ElahnaWeb.FileContentController.demo inside lib/elahna_web/controllers/file_content_controller.ex was called
> It loaded priv/content/xml/demo.xml (just an HTML snippet, kinda like a component?) and sent it as a response to the client
> HTMX swapped the div on the front page with the response.
Let's try POST request 📨
